instruction: How can I cancel my order?
response: You can cancel your order from the Orders section of your account before it has shipped. Open the order, click Cancel Order, and confirm. If the order has already shipped, you cannot cancel it, but you may refuse delivery or request a return once it arrives.

instruction: How do I track my order?
response: Go to Orders in your account and select the order you want to track. Click Track Shipment to see the current status and estimated delivery date. You will also receive tracking updates by email once the order ships.

instruction: My order says delivered but I did not receive it.
response: I'm sorry for the trouble. Please first check with neighbours and around your property, and allow 24 hours as carriers sometimes mark parcels early. If it still does not appear, contact our support team with your order number so we can open an investigation with the carrier and arrange a replacement or refund.

instruction: Can I change the shipping address after placing an order?
response: You can update the shipping address only while the order status is Processing. Open the order, select Edit Shipping Address, enter the new details, and save. Once the order is Shipped, the address can no longer be changed and you would need to arrange redelivery with the carrier.

instruction: How long does delivery take?
response: Standard delivery usually takes 3 to 5 business days, and express delivery 1 to 2 business days, after the order is dispatched. Exact timing depends on your location and is shown at checkout and on the order tracking page.

instruction: Why was my order cancelled automatically?
response: Orders are automatically cancelled when payment could not be authorised, when an item became unavailable, or when a fraud check could not be completed. Please check the email we sent for the specific reason. You are not charged for cancelled orders, and you are welcome to place the order again.

instruction: Can I order an item that is out of stock?
response: If an item is out of stock you can select Notify Me on the product page to receive an email when it is back. Some items also allow backorder at checkout, in which case they ship as soon as new stock arrives.

instruction: How do I add an item to an order I already placed?
response: Items cannot be added to an existing order once it is confirmed. Please place a new order for the additional item. If both orders have not shipped yet, contact support and we may be able to combine the shipments to save on delivery.

instruction: How can I return a product?
response: You can return most products within 30 days of delivery. Go to Orders, select the item, choose Return Item, pick a reason, and print the prepaid return label. Pack the item securely and drop it at any partner location. Your refund is issued once we receive and inspect the item.

instruction: How long do refunds take?
response: Refunds are processed within 3 to 5 business days after we receive your returned item. The amount is credited to your original payment method, and depending on your bank it may take an additional 2 to 7 business days to appear on your statement.

instruction: Can I return an item without the original packaging?
response: We prefer items to be returned in their original packaging, but we can still accept most returns without it as long as the item is unused and includes all accessories. Hygiene items, opened software, and personalised goods cannot be returned unless faulty.

instruction: What is your refund policy?
response: You may request a refund within 30 days of delivery for unused items in resalable condition. Faulty items can be refunded or replaced within the warranty period. Refunds are issued to the original payment method after we receive and inspect the returned item.

instruction: I received a damaged item. What should I do?
response: I'm sorry your item arrived damaged. Please go to Orders, select the item, choose Report a Problem, and upload a photo of the damage. We will arrange a free replacement or a full refund right away, and you will not be charged for return shipping.

instruction: I received the wrong item.
response: Apologies for the mix-up. Please open the order, select Report a Problem, and choose Wrong Item Received. We will send the correct item immediately and provide a prepaid label to return the incorrect one at no cost to you.

instruction: How do I exchange a product for a different size?
response: Go to Orders, select the item, and choose Exchange. Pick the new size, and if it is in stock we will reserve it and ship it once we receive your original item, or immediately if you choose Instant Exchange. A prepaid return label is included.

instruction: Do I have to pay for return shipping?
response: Return shipping is free when the return is due to our error, such as a damaged, faulty, or wrong item. For change-of-mind returns a small return shipping fee may be deducted from your refund, which is shown before you confirm the return.

instruction: Can I get a refund after 30 days?
response: Change-of-mind refunds are only available within 30 days of delivery. After that window, we can still help if the item is faulty and within its warranty period. Please contact support with your order number and a description of the issue.

instruction: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
response: On the login page, click Forgot Password and enter the email address on your account. We will send a secure reset link that is valid for 30 minutes. Follow the link to set a new password. If the email does not arrive, check your spam folder or request the link again.

instruction: How do I change my email address?
response: Sign in and go to Account Settings, then Personal Information. Update your email address and save. For security we will send a confirmation link to the new address, and the change takes effect once you click it.

instruction: How do I update my phone number?
response: Go to Account Settings, then Personal Information, and edit the phone number field. Save your changes. We may send a one-time verification code to confirm the new number.

instruction: Why is my account locked?
response: Accounts are temporarily locked after several failed sign-in attempts to protect you from unauthorised access. Please wait 30 minutes and try again, or reset your password using the Forgot Password link. If it remains locked, contact support to verify your identity.

instruction: How do I delete my account?
response: You can request account deletion from Account Settings, then Privacy, and select Delete Account. Because this permanently removes your data and order history, we ask you to confirm by email. Any open orders or refunds should be completed first.

instruction: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
response: Go to Account Settings, then Security, and turn on Two-Factor Authentication. Choose to receive codes by SMS or an authenticator app, then follow the setup steps. Once enabled, you will enter a code each time you sign in from a new device.

instruction: Someone may have accessed my account. What should I do?
response: Please reset your password immediately from the Forgot Password link and enable two-factor authentication. Review recent orders and saved payment methods for anything unfamiliar, and remove any devices you do not recognise under Security. Contact support if you see unauthorised activity so we can secure the account.

instruction: How do I update my saved payment card?
response: Go to Account Settings, then Payment Methods. You can add a new card, set it as default, and remove the old one. For your security we never display full card numbers, only the last four digits.

instruction: What payment methods do you accept?
response: We accept major credit and debit cards including Visa, Mastercard, and American Express, as well as PayPal and popular digital wallets. Available options are shown at checkout based on your region.

instruction: Why was my payment declined?
response: Payments are usually declined due to incorrect card details, insufficient funds, an expired card, or your bank's fraud protection. Please check your details and try again, or use a different payment method. If the problem continues, contact your bank to authorise the transaction.

instruction: I was charged twice for one order.
response: I'm sorry for the concern. A duplicate charge is often a temporary authorisation hold that drops off within a few business days rather than a real second charge. If you see two settled charges for the same order, contact support with the dates and amounts and we will refund the duplicate promptly.

instruction: How do I get an invoice or receipt for my order?
response: Go to Orders, select the order, and click Download Invoice to save a PDF receipt. Receipts are also emailed automatically after each purchase. For business invoices with tax details, add your company information in Account Settings before ordering.

instruction: Do you offer refunds to store credit?
response: Yes. When requesting a return you can choose a refund to your original payment method or to store credit. Store credit is applied instantly once the return is approved and never expires, so it is the fastest way to shop again.

instruction: How do I apply a discount or promo code?
response: Enter your promo code in the Discount Code box on the checkout page and click Apply before completing payment. The discount is reflected in your order total. Codes cannot be added after an order is placed, and only one code applies per order unless stated otherwise.

instruction: Why did my promo code not work?
response: A promo code may fail if it has expired, has already been used, does not meet the minimum spend, or does not apply to the items in your cart. Please check the code's terms. If it should be valid, contact support with the code and we will look into it.

instruction: Will I be charged sales tax?
response: Applicable sales tax or VAT is calculated based on your delivery address and shown on the order summary before you pay. The full tax breakdown also appears on your invoice.

instruction: How do I cancel my subscription?
response: Go to Account Settings, then Subscriptions, select the plan, and click Cancel Subscription. Your plan stays active until the end of the current billing period, and you will not be charged again. You can resubscribe at any time.

instruction: How do I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
response: In Account Settings, then Subscriptions, choose Change Plan and select the new tier. Upgrades take effect immediately with a prorated charge, while downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle so you keep the current features until then.

instruction: Will my subscription renew automatically?
response: Yes, subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each billing period using your saved payment method, so your service is not interrupted. We email a reminder before renewal, and you can turn off auto-renewal any time in Subscriptions.

instruction: How do I get a refund for a subscription I forgot to cancel?
response: We understand this happens. If you were charged for a renewal you did not intend to use, contact support within 14 days of the charge. For most plans we can cancel the renewal and issue a refund as a one-time courtesy, provided the service was not substantially used.

instruction: Can I pause my subscription instead of cancelling?
response: Yes. In Subscriptions, select Pause Subscription and choose how long to pause, up to three months. Billing stops during the pause and resumes automatically afterwards, keeping your settings and history intact.

instruction: How do I claim warranty on a product?
response: Go to Orders, select the item, and choose Warranty Claim, then describe the fault and upload a photo or video if possible. We will verify the warranty period and arrange a repair, replacement, or refund. Keep your proof of purchase, which is your order invoice.

instruction: How long is the warranty on my product?
response: Most products include a 12-month manufacturer warranty from the delivery date covering defects in materials and workmanship. Some products offer extended warranty, which is shown on the product page and your invoice. Accidental damage is not covered unless you purchased protection.

instruction: The product is not turning on. What should I do?
response: Please try these steps: make sure it is fully charged or connected to power, hold the power button for 10 seconds to force a restart, and try a different cable or outlet. If it still will not power on, it may be faulty, so contact support to arrange a warranty replacement.

instruction: How do I update the software or firmware on my device?
response: Open the companion app or the device Settings menu, go to Software Update, and select Check for Updates. Keep the device connected to power and Wi-Fi during the update, and do not switch it off until it completes.

instruction: The product keeps disconnecting from Wi-Fi.
response: Try moving the device closer to the router, restarting both the device and the router, and confirming you are on a 2.4 GHz network if the device does not support 5 GHz. Updating the firmware often resolves connection drops. If it persists, contact support for further troubleshooting.

instruction: How do I reset my device to factory settings?
response: Back up any data first, then go to Settings, System, and Factory Reset, or hold the reset button for 10 seconds if the screen is unresponsive. This erases all data and returns the device to its original state, so only do this if troubleshooting has not helped.

instruction: Do you offer a user manual for the product?
response: Yes. A digital user manual is available on the product page under Documents, and a quick-start guide is included in the box. If you cannot find it, tell support your product name and we will email the correct manual.

instruction: Is this product compatible with my existing device?
response: Compatibility details are listed in the Specifications section on each product page, including supported operating systems and connection types. If you tell support the exact model of your existing device, we can confirm whether it will work before you buy.

instruction: Do you ship internationally?
response: Yes, we ship to many countries. Available destinations, delivery times, and any customs duties are shown at checkout once you enter your address. Some items cannot be shipped internationally due to local regulations, and this is noted on the product page.

instruction: Can I choose a specific delivery date?
response: For eligible items and locations you can select a preferred delivery date at checkout under Delivery Options. If scheduled delivery is not available for your address, we offer the fastest standard or express options instead.

instruction: What courier do you use for delivery?
response: We work with several trusted couriers and select the best one for your location and the item's size. The assigned carrier and tracking number appear on your order page as soon as the parcel is dispatched.

instruction: My tracking has not updated in several days.
response: Tracking can occasionally stall while a parcel moves between hubs, especially for international shipments. If there is no update for more than three business days, contact support with your order number so we can open an inquiry with the carrier and, if needed, send a replacement.

instruction: Can I collect my order from a store or pickup point?
response: Yes, where available you can choose Click and Collect or a nearby pickup point at checkout. We will email you when the order is ready, along with the collection address, opening hours, and the reference number to bring with you.

instruction: How can I contact customer support?
response: You can reach us through live chat on our website, by email at support, or by phone during business hours. Live chat is usually fastest. Whichever channel you choose, please have your order number ready so we can help you quickly.

instruction: What are your customer support hours?
response: Our live chat and phone support are available Monday to Friday from 8am to 8pm and weekends from 9am to 5pm local time. Email support operates around the clock, and we aim to reply within 24 hours.

instruction: How long will it take to get a response to my ticket?
response: We aim to respond to support tickets within 24 hours, and often much sooner. Urgent and high-priority issues, such as failed deliveries or account security, are prioritised. You will receive email updates as your ticket progresses.

instruction: How do I check the status of my support ticket?
response: Sign in and go to Support, then My Tickets, to see the status and full history of each ticket. You will also receive an email whenever an agent replies or the status changes.

instruction: Can I speak to a human agent instead of the chatbot?
response: Absolutely. In live chat, type 'agent' or select Talk to a Human, and you will be connected to a support representative during business hours. If no agent is available, you can leave your details and we will follow up by email.

instruction: How do I escalate my complaint?
response: If your issue has not been resolved, reply to your existing ticket and ask for it to be escalated, or select Escalate in My Tickets. A senior support specialist will review your case and respond, usually within one business day.

instruction: How do I give feedback about my support experience?
response: After each interaction we send a short satisfaction survey by email where you can rate your experience and leave comments. You can also share feedback any time through the Feedback link in your account. We read every response and use it to improve.

instruction: How is my personal data protected?
response: We protect your data with encryption in transit and at rest, strict access controls, and regular security reviews, in line with applicable data protection laws. We never sell your personal information. You can review and manage your data in Account Settings under Privacy.

instruction: How can I download a copy of my data?
response: Go to Account Settings, then Privacy, and select Download My Data. We will prepare a file containing your account information and order history and email you a secure download link, usually within 48 hours.

instruction: How do I stop receiving marketing emails?
response: You can unsubscribe using the link at the bottom of any marketing email, or manage your preferences in Account Settings under Notifications. Please note you will still receive essential service messages such as order and security updates.

instruction: Can I send an order as a gift?
response: Yes. At checkout, select This Is a Gift to add a personalised message and hide prices on the packing slip. You can also ship directly to the recipient's address. Gift receipts make returns or exchanges easy for the recipient.

instruction: Do you offer gift cards?
response: Yes, digital gift cards are available in a range of values and are delivered by email with instructions to redeem at checkout. Gift cards do not expire and can be used across multiple orders until the balance runs out.

instruction: How do I redeem a gift card?
response: At checkout, enter your gift card code in the Gift Card box and click Apply. The balance is deducted from your order total, and any remaining balance stays on the card for future purchases.

instruction: Do you offer discounts for bulk or business orders?
response: Yes, we offer tiered pricing for larger and business orders. Please contact our sales team through the Business Enquiries form with the items and quantities you need, and we will prepare a quote and set up a business account if required.

instruction: How do I leave a review for a product?
response: Once your order is delivered, go to Orders, select the item, and click Write a Review to add a star rating and comments. Your feedback helps other customers and the product team. Reviews are published after a short moderation check.

instruction: Is it safe to save my card details on your site?
response: Yes. Card details are stored securely by our certified payment provider, not on our own servers, and are protected to industry PCI-DSS standards. We only ever show the last four digits, and you can remove a saved card at any time in Payment Methods.

instruction: What happens if an item goes on sale after I buy it?
response: If an item you purchased is reduced within 7 days of your order, contact support and we will refund the difference as a price-match courtesy, subject to our price adjustment policy. This does not apply to clearance or limited flash sales.

instruction: Can I reorder something I bought before?
response: Yes. Go to Orders, find the previous order, and select Buy Again to add the same items to your cart. If an item is no longer available, we will suggest the closest current alternative.

instruction: Do you price match with other retailers?
response: We offer price matching on identical, in-stock items sold by selected major retailers. Contact support with a link to the competitor's product and price, and if it meets our price match terms we will match it or explain why it does not qualify.

instruction: How do I change the currency or language on the site?
response: Use the region selector, usually at the top or bottom of the page, to change your country, language, and currency. Your preference is saved to your account so prices and content display correctly on future visits.

instruction: My discount was not applied even though I entered the code.
response: I'm sorry for the frustration. Please confirm the code was entered exactly, with no extra spaces, and that your cart meets any minimum spend or eligible items. If the order is not yet placed, remove and re-add the code. If it still fails, share the code with support and we will apply the discount manually.

instruction: Can I get a replacement part instead of returning the whole product?
response: In many cases, yes. Tell support which part is missing or faulty and your order number, and we will ship a replacement part directly where one is available, which is often faster than returning the whole product.

instruction: What should I do if I entered the wrong shipping address?
response: If the order is still Processing, edit the address under Orders straight away. If it has already shipped, contact support quickly with the correct details, and we will try to reroute the parcel with the carrier, though this cannot always be guaranteed.

instruction: How do I report a problem with my order?
response: Go to Orders, select the affected order, and choose Report a Problem. Pick the issue type, add a short description, and attach photos if relevant. Our team will review it and reply with the next steps, usually within 24 hours.

instruction: Do you offer installation or setup help?
response: For selected products we offer guided setup through our help centre articles and video tutorials, and live chat assistance during business hours. Professional installation may be available for larger items at checkout in eligible regions.

instruction: What is your policy on late deliveries?
response: If a guaranteed express delivery arrives late due to our error, contact support and we may refund the shipping fee. For standard delivery we give estimated dates rather than guarantees, but we will always investigate significant delays with the carrier.

instruction: Can I cancel a return I already requested?
response: Yes. If you have not yet posted the item, go to Orders, open the return request, and select Cancel Return. The order remains as delivered and no refund is processed. If you already shipped the item, let it complete and simply reorder if needed.

instruction: How do I know if my order was successfully placed?
response: After a successful order you see an on-screen confirmation with an order number and receive a confirmation email within a few minutes. You can also verify it appears under Orders in your account. If you see no confirmation, the order may not have gone through.

instruction: Why do I see a pending charge that is more than my order total?
response: Some banks place a temporary pre-authorisation hold that can appear slightly higher than your final total. This is not a real charge and is released within a few business days. The amount you are actually charged matches your order invoice.

instruction: Can I use more than one gift card on a single order?
response: Yes, you can apply multiple gift cards at checkout by entering each code in turn. The balances combine toward your order total, and any leftover balance stays on the cards for later use.

instruction: How do I unsubscribe from SMS notifications?
response: Reply STOP to any of our SMS messages to opt out, or turn off SMS alerts in Account Settings under Notifications. You will still receive critical security messages needed to protect your account.

instruction: Do you offer next-day delivery?
response: Next-day delivery is available on eligible items to many locations when you order before the daily cut-off time, usually shown at checkout. Choose the Express or Next-Day option to see if it applies to your address.

instruction: What do I do if my package arrived opened or tampered with?
response: Please do not use the item if it looks tampered with. Take photos of the packaging, go to Orders, and select Report a Problem, choosing Package Tampered. We will arrange a replacement or refund and investigate the incident with the carrier.

instruction: How can I add items to my wishlist?
response: On any product page, click the heart or Add to Wishlist icon to save it. You can view and manage saved items under Wishlist in your account, and move them to your cart whenever you are ready to buy.

instruction: Can I get help choosing the right product?
response: Of course. Tell our support or sales team what you need the product for and any must-have features, and we will recommend suitable options and compare them for you. Our product pages also include buying guides and comparison tools.

instruction: What happens to my order if a payment refund fails?
response: If a refund cannot reach your original payment method, for example a closed card, we will contact you to arrange an alternative such as store credit or a bank transfer, so you always receive the money you are owed.

instruction: How do I merge two accounts I accidentally created?
response: Contact support from the email addresses on both accounts and let us know which one you want to keep. After verifying your identity, we will move your order history to the primary account and close the duplicate.

instruction: Do you offer a loyalty or rewards program?
response: Yes, our rewards program earns you points on eligible purchases that you can redeem for discounts. Join for free in Account Settings under Rewards, where you can also track your points balance and see current member offers.

instruction: Why is my refund less than what I paid?
response: A refund may be reduced if a change-of-mind return shipping fee applied, if a promotional discount was recalculated, or if the item was returned incomplete or not in resalable condition. Your return summary lists any deductions, and support can explain the details.

instruction: Can I change my payment method after placing an order?
response: Once an order is confirmed the payment method cannot be changed. If payment failed, the order stays unpaid and you can retry with a different method. Otherwise, you would need to cancel the order, if still eligible, and place it again.

instruction: How do I find products that are in stock near me?
response: Use the Check Availability option on a product page and enter your postcode to see nearby stock and pickup points. You can also filter search results by In Stock to show only items ready to ship or collect.

instruction: What should I do if the website is not loading or checkout fails?
response: Please try refreshing the page, clearing your browser cache, or using a different browser or device, as this resolves most checkout errors. If it continues, contact support with a screenshot of any error message and the approximate time, so we can investigate.

instruction: Do you offer extended warranty or protection plans?
response: Yes, for many products you can add an extended warranty or accidental damage protection plan at checkout. The coverage details, duration, and price are shown before you buy, and the plan is linked to your order for easy claims.

instruction: How do I request a VAT or tax invoice for my business?
response: Add your business name and tax registration number in Account Settings before ordering, then download the invoice from the Orders page after purchase. If you need a tax invoice for a past order, contact support with the order number and your business details.

instruction: Can I schedule a callback from support?
response: Yes. In the Contact Us section, choose Request a Callback, pick a convenient time slot, and provide your number. An agent will call you at the scheduled time, which saves you waiting in a phone queue.

instruction: My promo credit disappeared from my account.
response: I'm sorry to hear that. Promo credits can expire on their stated date or be consumed by a previous order. Check the Rewards or Credits section for the history and expiry. If a valid credit is genuinely missing, contact support and we will investigate and restore it if appropriate.

instruction: How do I know my order is being processed and not stuck?
response: An order moves through clear statuses: Processing, Shipped, Out for Delivery, and Delivered, shown on the order page. As long as it shows Processing within the stated handling time it is on track. If it stays in one status beyond the expected time, contact support to check.

instruction: Can I return a gift I received?
response: Yes. If you have a gift receipt or the order number, go to Returns and select Gift Return to send the item back and receive store credit or an exchange, without the original buyer being notified of the refund amount. If you do not have those details, contact support for help.

instruction: How do I change the quantity of an item before it ships?
response: While the order status is Processing you can contact support to adjust the quantity, subject to stock and pricing. Once the order is Shipped the quantity cannot be changed, but you can return any unwanted items after delivery.

instruction: Do you offer live order updates by text message?
response: Yes. Opt in to SMS notifications in Account Settings under Notifications to receive dispatch, out-for-delivery, and delivery alerts by text. You can turn these off at any time or reply STOP to opt out.

instruction: What happens if nobody is home for the delivery?
response: If you miss a delivery, the carrier will usually leave a card and attempt redelivery the next business day, or hold the parcel at a local pickup point. You can often reschedule or redirect the delivery using the tracking link in your dispatch email.

instruction: How do I apply for a corporate or bulk account?
response: Submit the Business Enquiries form with your company details and expected order volume. Our team will review it, set up a business account with any agreed pricing, and enable features such as tax invoices and multiple user logins.

instruction: Can I get a summary of all my past orders?
response: Yes. Go to Orders to see your full purchase history with dates, items, and totals, and use Download My Data under Privacy for a complete export. For accounting, each order also has a downloadable invoice.
